index.title: Resource Translator
index.description: Resource Translator opens machine-translated pull requests for your resource files in any repo, in any format — powered by Azure AI Translator, AWS Translate, or Google Cloud Translation.
index.socialTitle: Resource Translator — translate resource files automatically
index.badge: v3.0 — Azure, AWS & Google providers, Node 24, repo config
index.lede: Resource Translator opens machine-translated pull requests for your resource files using Azure, AWS, or Google — one unified action, one provider per run, official SDKs under the hood.
index.workflowTitle: Okuvvuunula ng'omulimu gw'okuvvuunula, so si kukola mirimu.
index.workflowBody: Drop the action into your existing CI, point it at Azure, AWS, or Google, and let your repo speak every language you target.

config.title: Repo-level config
config.body: Drop a {configPath} file for include globs, glossaries, and Custom Translator categories.

glossary.title: Glossary-aware
glossary.body: Lock brand names and product terms with smart word-boundary regex that handles {cpp}, {dotnet}, and friends.

dryRun.title: Bye Bye + Soft-Fail
dryRun.body: Preview translations without writing files, or surface every error as a warning while you iterate.

sdk.title: Azure, AWS & Google
sdk.body: Pick one provider per run. Buli kimu kikulemberwa SDK yakyo ({azureSdk}, {awsSdk}, {googleSdk}) nga kirina okuddamu okugezesebwa ku {statusCodes} — tewali HTTP ekoleddwa mu ngalo. {esbuild}-bundled, audit-clean.

workflowPreview.body: Three secrets, four lines, and your repo is multilingual on the next push.
workflowPreview.setupLink: Genda mu bujjuvu ng'oyita mu kivvulu ky'omuyimbi Desire Lu

cta.title: Ready to localize on autopilot?
cta.body: One provider key — Azure, AWS, or Google — and one workflow file. Omuvvuunuzi w'ebikozesebwa akola ebisigaddewo.

getting-started.title: Okutandika
getting-started.lede: Add a workflow file, point it at your Azure AI Translator credentials, and the action will scan the repo for source-language resource files and emit translated siblings.

provision.title: Provision an Azure AI Translator resource
provision.body: Create an Azure AI Translator resource in the Azure portal, then store the following as GitHub repository secrets so the workflow can read them:
provision.key: The subscription key for the resource.

resource.title: Commit a source resource file
resource.body: Resource files use the {namingConvention} convention. Eky'okulabirako, {sourceFile} {frFile}, {deFile}, n'ebirala oluvannyuma lw'okudduka.

output.title: Inspect the output
output.body: Ng'omulimu guwedde, ekikolwa kiraga ebivaamu bisatu by'osobola okukozesa mu kunnyonnyola PR: {summaryTitle}, {summaryDetails}, ne {hasNewTranslations}. It also writes a Markdown summary into the job page via {coreSummary}.

nextSteps.title: Emitendera egiddako
nextSteps.recipes: See recipes for monorepos, custom glossaries, and Custom Translator categories.

providers.title: Abavvuunuzi
providers.lede: Choose one translation provider per run — Azure AI Translator, AWS Translate, or Google Cloud Translation — behind a single, unified API surface. Omuvvuunuzi yeeyisa mu ngeri y'emu awatali kusosola; Ebiwandiiko byokka byawukana.
providers.backwardCompatible: Fully backward compatible: {provider} defaults to {azure}, so existing Azure workflows keep working unchanged — no edits required.

selecting.title: Okulonda omusuubuzi
selecting.body: Mu ngeri y'emu, {provider} bw'owandiisa {azure} (default), {aws}, oba {google}, olwo n'owa obubaka bw'omuwabuzi oyo. Only one provider is used per action call; the action deterministically delegates to the matching SDK behind a factory.

aws.name: AWS Translate
aws.credentials: OIDC / default chain, oba awsAccessKeyId + awsSecretAccessKeyKey; awsRegion

azure.title: Azure AI Translator (default)
azure.body: Omuwaabi wa Gavumenti eyalemererwa. Provision an Azure AI Translator resource and pass {subscriptionKey}, {endpoint}, and optionally {region}. This is the same configuration existing workflows already use.

aws.title: AWS Translate
aws.body: Kozesa {sdk}. Prefer OIDC via {configureAwsCredentials} so no long-lived secrets are stored — the action reads the AWS SDK default credential chain. Alternatively, pass {awsAccessKeyId} and {awsSecretAccessKey} explicitly. A region is always needed, via {awsRegion} or the {awsRegionEnv} environment variable.
aws.keysNote: To use static keys instead of OIDC, drop the {configureAwsCredentials} step and pass {awsAccessKeyId}/{awsSecretAccessKey} (via {secrets}) plus {awsRegion}.

google.title: Google Cloud Translation
google.body: Kozesa {sdk} (v2). Okukakasa ng'okozesa ekisumuluzo kya API ({googleApiKey}) oba akawunti y'obuweereza (JSON credential ({googleCredentials}). Supply exactly one; an optional {googleProjectId} is inferred from the credential when omitted.

mapping.title: Intent-specifier mapping
mapping.body: Ebifaananyi by'ebi Ebirala byonna biva ku buzibu obw'amagezi, n'olwekyo enneeyisa esigala nga nnungi nnyo.
mapping.caption: Intent-specifier mapping across providers

locales.title: Locale codes differ per provider
locales.body: Buli kitongole kikozesa ennamba zaakyo ez'ekifo (eky'okulabirako Simplified Chinese {azureCode} ku Azure, {awsCode} ku AWS, ne {googleCode} ku Google). Codes pass through as-is and drive the output file names, so choose {toLocales} values your selected provider supports.

configuration.title: Enteekateeka
configuration.lede: Express defaults once in the repository config file and let every workflow inherit them. Action inputs always win when both are provided
configuration.intro: {configPath} Bwâ€TMoba weetaaga akawuka akaleeta siriimu, bwâ€TMoba weetaaga akawuka akaleeta siriimu.

fields.sourceLocale: Okudda mu {sourceLocale} bw'eba nga teyateekebwawo. Also forwarded to Translator as {fromLocale} so short strings are not autodetected.
fields.toLocales: Oba ng'ekitundu eky'enjawulo oba eky'omulembe eky'enjawulo eky'omuwendo gw'abazannyi ba Cranes.
fields.includeExclude: Glob patterns tested against absolute and workspace-relative paths.
fields.categoryId: Azure {customTranslatorLink} category — your industry/domain knob (legal, medical, marketing tone, etc.). Sent as {categoryQuery}.
fields.textType: Okulemererwa {plain} Use {html} only if your resource values contain real HTML fragments.
fields.profanityAction: Engeri gy'oyinza okuvvuunula ebigambo ebitali bimu mu kuvvuunula ebitabo by'Obusiraamu?
fields.allowFallback: Set to {false} to fail the translation when your {categoryId} has no deployment for a target locale instead of falling back to the general model.
fields.maxRetries: Maximum retry attempts on transient HTTP responses ({statusCodes}). Okulemererwa okutuukiriza {defaultRetries}. Total HTTP calls per request is {totalCalls}.
fields.retryBackoffMs: Dil Ki Awaaz Okulemererwa {defaultBackoff} Azure's {retryAfter} header is honored exactly when exist; otherwise jittered exponential backoff is used, capped at this value.
fields.protectPlaceholders: Okulemererwa {true} Obubonero nga {mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} ne HTML bukyusibwa n'obubonero bwa sentinel nga tebunnaba kuvvuunulwa era ne buzzibwayo oluvannyuma. Disable only when source intentionally contains placeholder-shaped literals.
fields.customPlaceholderPatterns: Endagaano ez'enjawulo (nga tezirina delimiters) zongeddwako ku seti y'ekifo eky'enjawulo, e.g. {angleToken} for custom token syntax. Invalid regexes are ignored.
fields.noTranslatePatterns: Obubonero bwa Glob bukwatagana n'ebisumuluzo eby'omutendera ogwa parser (JSON dotted path, RESX {resxName}, PO {poMsgid}, XLIFF unit {xliffId}, INI/restext key). Matching keys are dropped from the request and pass through with their source value preserved.

steps.actionInputs: The action reads explicit inputs from the workflow.
steps.config: It loads the YAML config from {configPath}.
steps.precedence: For every shared field, the input wins; Bw'oba tokozesezza omuwendo gwa YAML gukozesebwa.
steps.validation: The merged values are validated. Obubaka obutali butuufu (e.g. {invalidEnum}) buleetera ekikolwa okulemererwa mangu n'obubaka obutegeerekeka.

tone.heading: Tone and industry, in plain terms
tone.body: S3 Ssabasajja Kabaka Muteesa I Ssabasajja Kabaka Muteesa I S3 Tekirina Ssabasajja Kabaka Yekka - Watchdog Uganda Two settings together to give you most of the same control:
tone.industryBody: Use {categoryId} to point at an Azure {customTranslatorLink} category trained on your own corpus — legal, technical, medical, marketing, or anything else. Eno y'enkola esinga amaanyi mu ddoboozi lya langi n'olulimi lw'eggwanga.
tone.surfaceBody: Use the {glossaryLink} to lock brand names and product terms verbatim, and use {profanityAction} to scrub profane terms when targeting localization for young audiences.

inputs.title: Inputs & outputs
inputs.lede: Buli kiwandiiko nakyo kikkirizibwa mu fayiro ya repo config. Zombi bwe ziba ziteekeddwawo, ekikolwa kiwangula.
inputs.configurationIntro: See {configurationLink} for the YAML schema and loading order.

items.sourceLocale: Source locale (e.g. {en}) used to find resource files such as {sourceGlob}. Era yasindikibwa eri omuwaabi nga {fromLocale}.

providerInputs.heading: Provider selection & credentials
providerInputs.caption: Provider selection and per-vendor credentials
providerInputs.intro: Choose one provider per run with {provider}. Supply only the selected provider's credentials — see the {providersLink} guide for full setup.

items.provider: Okuvvuunula: {azure} (default), {aws}, oba {google}. Omuweereza omu yekka y'akozesebwa ku buli kuyita kw'ekikolwa.
items.subscriptionKey: Azure AI Translator subscription key. Obwetaavu bw'{azure} bye bye {secrets}
items.endpoint: Azure Translator endpoint URL, e.g. {endpointUrl}. Bye bye {azure}
items.awsAccessKeyId: AWS access key ID. Optional — omit (with {awsSecretAccessKey}) to use the AWS default credential chain / OIDC. bye bye {secrets}
items.awsSecretAccessKey: Kyama Kyama Kyagulanyi Ssentamu Ateekwa okuba ng'ali wamu n'{awsAccessKeyId}. bye bye {secrets}
items.awsSessionToken: Optional AWS session token for temporary credentials. Pass through {secrets}.
items.awsRegion: Akakiiko k'ebyokulonda kategeezezza nti akakiiko k'ebyokulonda kategeezezza nti akakiiko k'ebyokulonda kategeezezza {regionExample} nti akakiiko k'ebyokulonda kategeezezza nti Okuggyako ng'{aws} kikolebwa mu ngeri ey'enjawulo okuggyako ng'{awsRegionEnv} mu mbeera y'obutonde bw'ensi.
items.googleApiKey: Google Cloud API key. Kitegeeza nga bwâ€TMonootera {googleCredentials} {google} â€TMolina. Pass through {secrets}.
items.googleCredentials: Google Cloud service-account key as a JSON string. Kitegeeza nga bwâ€TMonootera {googleApiKey} {google} â€TMolina. Pass through {secrets}.
items.googleProjectId: Optional Google Cloud project id. Usually inferred from the service-account credential.

items.region: Translator resource region (omit for global resources).
items.toLocales: Ebifo by'okuvvuunula Mu ngeri y'emu, kiwandikawo ennamba ya JSON ({jsonArray}) oba emiwendo egy'enjawulo egy'enjawulo.
items.include: Newline-separated glob patterns; Ebiwandiiko ebikwatagana byokka bye bivvuunulwa.
items.exclude: Newline-separated glob patterns; matching files are skipped (applied after include).
items.dryRun: Bw'{true} okuvvuunula n'okuvvuunula ebiwandiiko naye towandiika biwandiiko.
items.failOnError: When {true}, unexpected errors fail the action; Bwe {false}, ensobi ziba kulabula.

translatorInputs.heading: Azure Translator request inputs
translatorInputs.intro: These map directly on Azure AI Translator v3 query parameters and apply to the Azure provider. textType and profanityAction are also mapped to AWS/Google where an equivalent exist (see the providers guide); Ebisigadde bya Azure byokka. Buli kimu kiba kya kusalawo; the Translator defaults apply when unset.
translatorInputs.caption: Azure Translator request inputs

items.categoryId: Azure {customTranslatorLink} category — the industry/domain/tone knob. Mu ngeri y'emu n'atuuka ku ntikko ng'{categoryQuery}.
items.textType: {plain} oba {html}. Use {html} only when your resource values are real HTML fragments.
items.profanityAction: {noAction}, {marked}, oba {deleted}. Mu ngeri y'emu, Bayibuli eraga engeri ebigambo ebivvuunulwa gye bikozesebwa mu kuvvuunula.
items.allowFallback: When {false}, Translator returns an error instead of falling back to the general system if your {categoryId} has no deployment for a target locale.

resilienceInputs.heading: Obugumiikiriza n'obukuumi bw'ebifo
resilienceInputs.intro: These inputs control how the action behaves when Translator throttles your request and how it shields placeholder tokens like {mustache} or {indexZero} from being mangled during translation.
resilienceInputs.caption: Obugumiikiriza n'obukuumi bw'ebifo

items.maxRetries: Maximum retry attempts on transient HTTP responses ({statusCodes}). Omuwendo gw'essimu za HTTP buli kusaba guli {totalCalls}.
items.retryBackoffMs: Cap (in milliseconds) on any single backoff sleep. Ekikolwa kino kiwa ekitiibwa omutwe gwa Azure's {retryAfter} response kyennyini nga kiriwo; otherwise it uses jittered exponential backoff capped at this value.
items.protectPlaceholders: When {true} (default), placeholders such as {mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} and HTML entities are replaced with sentinel tokens before translation and restored later. Disable only when your source intentionally contains literal placeholder-shaped text that should be translated.
items.customPlaceholderPatterns: Newline-separated regexes (without delimiters) added to the default placeholder set, e.g. {angleToken} for custom token syntax.
items.noTranslatePatterns: Newline-divided glob patterns matched against parser-level keys (JSON dotted path, RESX {resxName}, PO {poMsgid}, XLIFF unit {xliffId}, INI/restext key). Matching keys are dropped from the Translator request and pass through with their source value preserved.

items.summaryDetails: Markdown summary suitable for a PR body or job summary.
items.hasNewTranslations: {trueString} lwe baafulumizibwa enkyusa emu oba okusingawo empya.

formats.title: Ebifaananyi bya fayiro
formats.lede: Six round-trippable resource formats. Ekikolwa kino kisoma buli fayiro ya source-locale, okuvvuunula emiwendo, era n'okuwandiika muganda ku buli kigendererwa ky'ekitundu.
formats.namingConvention: Ebiwandiiko byonna bikozesa enkola y'okuwandiisa amannya {namingConvention}.

resx.blurb: XML-based .NET resource files. Okuvvuunula ebiwandiiko eby'omunda ebya buli {dataValue} node, okukuuma ebirowoozo ne metadata.

xliff.blurb: OASIS XLIFF 2.0 documents. Buli {source} n'owandiika ebivaamu mu {target} efaanagana, n'okuteekawo {trgLang} y'ekitundu.

po.blurb: GNU gettext Portable Object files. Buli {msgid} / {msgidPlural} mu ngeri {msgstr} / {msgstrPlural}.

json.blurb: Arbitrary JSON files. Mu ngeri y'emu, enkyukakyuka zino zikyusibwa mu ngeri ey'enjawulo mu {delimiter} ez'enjawulo n'oluvannyuma ne zikyusibwa mu ngeri ey'enjawulo. Ebisumuluzo ({dottedKey}) bikuumibwa mu lujjudde.

ini.blurb: Simple {keyValue} files (Win32-style INI or any flat config). Section headers and comments are preserved.

restext.blurb: Microsoft MUI text resources — flat {keyValue} pairs used as a textual companion to {resx}.

roundTrip.heading: Obukakafu bw'okudda mu nnyumba
roundTrip.body: Ekigezo kino kikakasa byte-for-byte round-tripping for representative fixtures of every format. If a format quirk breaks round-tripping in your codebase, please {issueLink} with a minimal sample.

recipes.title: Recipes
recipes.lede: Common patterns for shipping translations: monorepos, glossaries, custom categories, dry runs, and tone control.

pullRequest.heading: Funa ekiragiro eky'okuggya ekkomo ku buli luvannyuma lw'okudduka

glossary.heading: Glossary for brand names and product terms
glossary.body: Ebigambo ebivvuunulwa bikozesebwa {after} kuvvuunula, n'olwekyo ekivaamu ekivvuunulwa mu mashine kikuuma akabonero k'oyagala ne bw'oba ng'ekifaananyi kikyusiddwa.

customCategory.heading: Custom Translator category (industry / domain)
customCategory.body: Tendeka ekitongole kya Azure {customTranslatorLink} ku corpus ekwata ebigambo by'ekitongole kyo (amateeka, eby'obujjanjabi, eby'obusuubuzi, n'ebirala) era oyise ID yakyo okuyita mu {categoryId}. This is the strongest tone lever Azure offers.

tone.heading: Tone control + strict fallback
tone.body: Combine a Custom Translator {categoryId} with {profanityAction} and {allowFallbackFalse} to enforce a consistent voice and fail the workflow if the chosen category does not have a deployment for one of your target locales.

dryRun.heading: Okuwummula nga tonnaba kukyusa mirimu gya Ssekabaka Muteesa II
dryRun.body: Ekikolwa kino kikyafulumya ebivaamu mu bufunze n'ekifaananyi eky'omutendera, naye tewali fayiro ewandiikiddwa. Combine with {failOnErrorFalse} to surface every issue as a warning while you iterate.

faq.title: Ebibuuzo ebitera okubuuzibwa
faq.lede: Okuddamu mu bwangu ebibuuzo ebitera okubuuzibwa ng'okozesa ekikolwa ekyo.

azure.heading: Ekikolwa kyogera kitya ne Azure?
azure.body: Okuyita mu kitongole kya Microsoft {azureSdkLink} SDK, ekisangibwa ku {corePipelineLink}. Kino kikuyamba okuddamu okugezaako ku {statusCodes}, okuwandiika okusaba n'okuddamu, n'okukwata omutwe ogw'okukakasa ku bwereere — buli kimu ekyali kikozesebwa {axios} okukuba essimu. Obukodyo bw'okukyusa (ebivaamu, ebivaamu, ebivaamu) tebukyusibwa.

tone.heading: Lwaki ebiseera ebimu ebivvuunulwa bibeera bya buseere oba bya buseere?
tone.body: Machine translation defaults to a general-purpose model. Three knobs help: a {glossaryLink} for hard term overrides, a {customTranslatorLink} for fine-tuned models trained on your tone and vocabulary, and {profanityAction} to scrub or flag profane terms.

duplicateFiles.heading: Nnyinza ntya okwewala okuvvuunula fayiro y'emu emirundi ebiri?
duplicateFiles.body: Trigger the workflow on {paths} that match your source-locale files only, e.g. {sourceGlob}. Ekikolwa era kirimu firiigi yakyo eya per-trigger file filter nga {githubToken} eteekeddwawo, okukendeeza omulimu ku fayiro mu commit esembayo.

offline.heading: Nsobola okudduka ku yintaneeti?
offline.body: Not exactly — Azure AI Translator is the runtime brain. Wabula osobola okukozesa {dryRunTrue} okukakasa okukyusa n'okukyusa awatali kusaba kwonna kwa HTTP okuvvuunula.

node.heading: What Node version does the action run on?
node.body: S3 Bye {nodeRuntime}Bye Bye JavaScript ekwatagana ne Node 20, 22, ne 24.

dist.heading: Obulwadde bwa siriimu {distDir} buva wa?
dist.body: GitHub JS actions ship their compiled JS in the repository. The {distBuild} workflow rebuilds it after every merge to {mainBranch} if it would drift, and {distCheck} blocks PRs that would land out-of-date output.

formats.heading: Ate ebikozesebwa ebirala?
formats.body: Leero: {resx}, {xliff}, {po}, {json}, {ini}, {restext}. {issueLink} if you need another — the parser interface is small (parse → map → apply translations → format) and contributions are welcome.

translations.title: Okuvvuunula
translations.lede: This page is translated by Resource Translator itself, on every push to main, into every language Azure AI Translators supports.
translations.statusPending: {translatedCount} currently rendered — {pendingCount} waiting the next {workflowName} run.
translations.filterPlaceholder: Okunoonyereza ku lulimi oluzaalibwa, ennamba oba erinnya ly'ennimi enzaalwa.

steps.source: The English source file lives at {messagesPath}.
steps.workflow: Pushes that touch it kick off {workflowLink}, which runs {thisAction} against itself.
steps.fanOut: Ekikolwa kino kigenda mu buli kitundu ekiwagirwa Azure AI Translator (ekitegekeddwa mu {configPath}) era kiwandika {messagesLocaleJson} ku buli kigendererwa.
steps.pullRequest: A pull request is opened with the new translations. Okugatta olupapula luno kuddamu okufulumya olupapula luno nga kaadi zijjudde amaanyi.

translations.poweredBy: Powered by Resource Translator and Azure AI Translator.

contributing.title: Okuwaayo
contributing.lede: Bug reports, feature requests, and pull requests are all welcome. Ekikolwa kino kitono nnyo okusobozesa abazannyi omulundi ogusooka.

steps.extension: Add the file extension to {translationFileSchemes} in {finderFile}.
steps.tests: Write round-trip tests for parse → format and applyTranslations.

coverage.heading: Coverage thresholds
coverage.body: Jest config enforced minimum coverage. New code must keep the statements + lines threshold above 78% and functions above 90%. Add fixtures and tests along your change.

docsSite.heading: Documentation site
docsSite.body: The {docsDir} folder is an Astro 6 + Tailwind v4 project. Dduka {npmInstall} omulundi gumu, oluvannyuma {npmRunDev} olabe ekitundu. The {pagesWorkflow} workflow sends docs to GitHub Pages on every merge.

changelog.title: Enkyukakyuka
changelog.lede: High-level summary of releases. The canonical, authoritative changelog lives in CHANGELOG.md in the repository.

releases.v302: {label} Translator requests now pin {apiVersion} on the wire for both {translate} and {languages}. The Azure SDK only honors the client-level api-version option when a credential is passed; Ekikolwa kino kikakasa buli kusaba okuyita mu mitwe, n'olwekyo akakodyo kano kaggyibwawo mu kasirise era okusaba kwalemererwa okukyusibwa mu nkyukakyuka ya API eyagaana endagaano ya {translate} ne HTTP 400 (enkola y'ensobi {code}). Okutereeza kutandika mu 3.0.1.
releases.v301: {label} The {translate} request body is now a bare JSON array of {textItem} items instead of a wrapped {inputs} object, matching the v3.0 REST contract. Ku bwakyo kino tekyazzaawo kuvvuunula — laba 3.0.2.

items.newInputs: New inputs: {include}, {exclude}, {configPath}, {categoryId}, {apiVersion}, {dryRun}, {failOnError}, plus advanced Translator knobs {textType}, {profanityAction}, {profanityMarker}, and {allowFallback}.
items.sourceLocale: Source locale is now also forwarded to Translator as {fromLocale} so short strings are not autodetected.
items.resilience: {label} automatic retry on transient HTTP responses ({statusCodes}) honoring Azure's {retryAfter} header — falls back to jittered exponential backoff when absent. Tunable via {maxRetries} and {retryBackoffMs}. {issue}
items.placeholderProtection: {label} tokens like {mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} and HTML entities are wrapped in sentinels before translation and restored later, so Translator stops mangling i18next/Mustache/Handlebars/.NET/printf placeholders. Toggle via {protectPlaceholders}; Yongeyeyo {customPlaceholderPatterns} {issue}
items.perKeyOptOut: {label} new {noTranslatePatterns} input drops matching keys from the Translator request completely (preserves source values for brand names, error codes, etc.). Zikwatagana n'ebisumuluzo eby'omutendera ogwa parser (JSON dotted path, RESX {resxName}, PO {poMsgid}, XLIFF unit {xliffId}, INI/restext key). {issue}
items.tooling: esbuild bundler, ESLint 9 flat config, Prettier, EditorConfig.
items.docsSite: Astro + Tailwind v4 docs site with view transitions and Expressive Code.
items.docsAccessibility: {label} WCAG 2.1 AA pass. Logo glyphs converted to paths so they not longer fail color-contrast against gradient stops, the floating {backToTop} button uses {inert} while hidden (instead of an {ariaHidden} toggle that left it tabbable), {formatsAstro} sections no longer collide with their auto-generated heading IDs, three locale cards now expose BCP-47-valid {lang} attributes ({nya}, {lug}, {run}), duplicate {documentation} landmark labels are disambiguated between sidebar and footer,  and every data table on {inputs}/{configuration} ships with a screen-reader caption.
items.inlineCode: {label} docs prose {codeElement} now wears the warm/amber theme accent — different from the brand→accent palette used for links and headings.
items.automation: Dependabot auto-merge, CodeQL scanning, CI matrix.
